title: T-028 — Adjustment service + >10% manager-approval gate (WH §8.5)
prompt:
# T-028 — Adjustment service + >10% manager-approval gate (WH §8.5)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §8.5
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `adjustLpQuantity` service: delta ≤10% self-approved; |delta|>10% → write into `movement_approvals` pending Manager approval; positive delta (increase) always Manager-approval. Threshold is `settings.adjustment_approval_threshold_pct` (default 10).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/adjustment.ts`: function `adjustLpQuantity({lp_id, new_qty, reason_code, reason_text})`.
2. Compute `delta = new_qty - current_qty`, `delta_pct = |delta|/current_qty * 100`.
3. If `delta < 0 AND delta_pct ≤ threshold`: apply directly (LP.quantity = new_qty, stock_moves(move_type='adjustment', quantity=delta), lp_genealogy(operation_type='adjustment')).
4. Else: INSERT `movement_approvals(lp_id, requested_qty, current_qty, reason_code, reason_text, status='pending', requested_by)`; LP unchanged.
5. Separate `approveAdjustment({approval_id, approver_id})` service (Manager-only) applies pending and inserts the same stock_moves+genealogy rows.
6. reason_code mandatory; reason_text required when reason_code='other' (≥10 chars).

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-adjustment.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/movement-approvals.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_movement_approvals.sql [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/lp-adjustment.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given LP 100 → 95 (delta=-5, 5%), when adjusted, then LP.quantity=95 directly and stock_moves row exists.
2. Given LP 100 → 80 (delta=-20, 20%), when adjusted, then no LP change occurs and movement_approvals row exists with status='pending' (V-WH-MOV-004).
3. Given a pending approval, when approved by a Manager, then LP qty updates and stock_moves+genealogy are written.
4. Given LP 100 → 110 (positive delta), when adjusted, then it always routes to approval regardless of pct.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/adjustment.test.ts` asserting threshold routing + positive-delta always-approval + approval path + reason gate.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test adjustment`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not apply >10% adjustments without approval.
- Do not apply positive deltas without approval.
- Do not skip reason_code.

## Dependencies
- T-002
- T-006
- T-003
